top3.sql:
SELECT 
    e.EntStageName, 
    c.CustLastName
FROM Customers c
JOIN Musical_Preferences mp1 ON c.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
JOIN Musical_Preferences mp2 ON c.CustomerID = mp2.CustomerID
JOIN Entertainers e
JOIN Entertainer_Styles es1 ON e.EntertainerID = es1.EntertainerID
JOIN Entertainer_Styles es2 ON e.EntertainerID = es2.EntertainerID
WHERE 
    mp1.PreferenceSeq = 1 
    AND mp2.PreferenceSeq = 2
    AND mp1.StyleID != mp2.StyleID
    AND es1.StyleStrength = 1 
    AND es2.StyleStrength =...

SELECT 
    e.EntStageName, 
    c.CustLastName
FROM Customers c
JOIN (
    SELECT CustomerID, 
           MAX(CASE WHEN PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN StyleID END) AS Pref1,
           MAX(CASE WHEN PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN StyleID END) AS Pref2
    FROM Musical_Preferences
    GROUP BY CustomerID
    HAVING COUNT(*) <= 3
) cp ON c.CustomerID = cp.CustomerID

    e.EntStageName,

FROM Customers c

JOIN Musical_Preferences mp2 ON c.CustomerID = mp2.CustomerID AND mp2.PreferenceSeq = 2 AND mp1.StyleID < mp2.StyleID

SELECT 
    e.EntStageName, 
    c.CustLastName
FROM Customers c
JOIN (
    SELECT CustomerID, 
           StyleID AS Pref1, 
           LEAD(StyleID) OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY PreferenceSeq) AS Pref2
    FROM Musical_Preferences
    WHERE PreferenceSeq IN (1, 2)
) cp ON c.CustomerID = cp.CustomerID
JOIN Entertainers e
